sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id Int32, values Array(Int32));
SELECT arrayFirst(x -> x > 0, values) AS first_positive FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_arrays SET values = arrayConcat(values, [7]) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, arrayFirst(x -> x < 5, values) AS first_less_than_five FROM test_arrays;
